---
title: "LMM"
author: "bian"
date: "2025-12-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggeffects)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
source("anovakun_489.txt")
```



```{r}
data = read.csv("all_subjects_combined.csv")

# 将变量转为因子
data$subject <- as.factor(data$subject)

# 要移除的subject
remove_ids <- c()

# 方法1: 使用 %in% 和 !（最常用）
data <- data[!data$subject %in% remove_ids, ]

# condition重新编码：fm → f-kimera, u1m → u1-kimera
data$condition <- gsub(" ", "", data$condition)  # 去掉所有空格
data$condition <- gsub("^fm$", "f-kimera", data$condition)
data$condition <- gsub("^u1m$", "u1-kimera", data$condition)
data$condition <- as.factor(data$condition)

data$response <- 1-data$response
# RT转换为秒
data$RT <- data$RT / 1000

# percent反转后缩放：(100 - percent) / 100
data$percent_scaled <- (100 - data$percent) / 100

df_long <- data %>%
  mutate(
    condition = as.character(condition),
    intimacy = case_when(
      condition %in% c("f", "f-kimera") ~ "friend",
      condition %in% c("u1", "u1-kimera") ~ "stranger"
    ),
    face_type = case_when(
      condition %in% c("f", "u1") ~ "normal",
      condition %in% c("f-kimera", "u1-kimera") ~ "chimeric"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    intimacy = factor(intimacy, levels = c("friend", "stranger")),
    face_type = factor(face_type, levels = c("normal", "chimeric")),
    subject = factor(subject)
  )

df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent_scaled >= 0 & percent_scaled <= 0.3 ~ "low",
    percent_scaled >= 0.35 & percent_scaled <= 0.65 ~ "middle",
    percent_scaled >= 0.70 & percent_scaled <= 1 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  mutate(percent_group = factor(percent_group, levels = c("low", "middle", "high")))

# 確認分組
df_long %>% count(percent_group)

# 确认
df_long %>% count(intimacy, face_type)
```

```{r}
rt4_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject, order,intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(rt4_anovadata, "AsBCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "RT",
         peta = TRUE,cin = T,auto = T)
```
```{r}
rt_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(rt_anovadata, "sABC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "RT",
         peta = TRUE,cin = T,auto = T)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# --- データ準備 (変更なし) ---
rt_sum <- data.frame(
  intimacy = rep(c("Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend",
                   "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger"), 1),
  face_type = rep(c("Normal", "Normal", "Normal", "Chimeric", "Chimeric", "Chimeric"), 2),
  percent_group = rep(c("low", "middle", "high"), 4),
  RT = c(730.5156, 1031.9450, 1070.1622, 692.1745, 949.7287, 1013.7586,
         613.6995, 864.9351, 931.1365, 649.6462, 892.8533, 1003.9231),
  ci_lower = c(662.8596, 945.6568, 914.4344, 620.9999, 851.7117, 934.9449,
               536.3798, 765.8290, 820.7198, 572.5328, 773.6222, 880.0605),
  ci_upper = c(798.1716, 1118.2333, 1225.8900, 763.3491, 1047.7457, 1092.5723,
               691.0192, 964.0412, 1041.5533, 726.7596, 1012.0845, 1127.7857)
)

rt_sum$percent_group <- factor(rt_sum$percent_group, 
                               levels = c("low", "middle", "high"))
rt_sum$intimacy <- factor(rt_sum$intimacy, 
                          levels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
rt_sum$face_type <- factor(rt_sum$face_type,
                           levels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))

colors <- c("Friend" = "#7B68EE", "Stranger" = "#FF8C00")
pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.15)

# --- プロット作成 (Y軸の上限を少し調整) ---
p <- ggplot(rt_sum, aes(x = percent_group, y = RT, 
                        color = intimacy, group = intimacy)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.6, position = pd) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, position = pd) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = pd) +
  facet_wrap(~ face_type, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Intimacy") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(500, 1350), breaks = seq(500, 1300, 100)) +
  labs(x = "Morphing Percentage", y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black")
  )
print(p)
ggsave("RT.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```
